# David Grant

> Portfolio of David Grant, a full stack developer and photographer based in London. This site showcases projects, background, and contact information.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://grnt7.github.io/photography-portfolio/): Landing page with introduction and highlights
- [Portfolio](https://grnt7.github.io/photography-portfolio/portfolio): Selected development and creative projects
- [About](https://grnt7.github.io/photography-portfolio/about): Background, skills, and experience
- [Contact](https://grnt7.github.io/photography-portfolio/contact): Contact form and email details

## Contact

- Email: da.grant7@outlook.com
- [Contact page](https://grnt7.github.io/photography-portfolio/contact): Send a message via the contact form

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/grnt7): Source code and open source work
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com): Professional profile
- [Facebook](https://facebook.com): Social profile
- [Twitter](https://twitter.com): Social profile
